goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 12:30' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should depart from 'ely' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel should have 'a star of 0'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '8 people' and '5 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 12:30 and should leave on monday
The train should depart from ely and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time and price
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should have a star of 0
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
